plugin_desc: sFlow flow analysis template for switch devices. It maps exporter traffic to monitored assets, normalizes sampling rate, and provides overview, interface, protocol, port, endpoint, and conversation metrics.
name: Switch

metrics.name: device_flow_bytes_rate
metrics.description: Total normalized Flow traffic rate for the device.

metrics.name: device_flow_packets_rate
metrics.description: Total normalized Flow packet rate for the device.

metrics.name: device_flow_in_bytes_rate
metrics.description: Normalized inbound Flow traffic rate for the device.

metrics.name: device_flow_out_bytes_rate
metrics.description: Normalized outbound Flow traffic rate for the device.

metrics.name: device_flow_in_packets_rate
metrics.description: Normalized inbound Flow packet rate for the device.

metrics.name: device_flow_out_packets_rate
metrics.description: Normalized outbound Flow packet rate for the device.

metrics.name: device_flow_avg_packet_size
metrics.query: sum(sflow_bytes{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__} * label_value(sflow_bytes{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__}, "effective_sampling_rate")) by (instance_id) / sum(sflow_packets{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__} * label_value(sflow_packets{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__}, "effective_sampling_rate")) by (instance_id)
metrics.description: Average packet size calculated from normalized Flow bytes and packets.

metrics.name: device_flow_effective_sampling_rate
metrics.description: Effective sampling rate used for Flow traffic normalization.

metrics.name: device_flow_interface_bytes_rate
metrics.query: sum(label_replace(label_replace(sflow_bytes{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__} * label_value(sflow_bytes{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__}, "effective_sampling_rate"), "interface", "$1", "input_ifindex", "(.*)"), "direction", "in", "instance_id", "(.*)")) by (instance_id, interface, direction) + sum(label_replace(label_replace(sflow_bytes{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__} * label_value(sflow_bytes{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__}, "effective_sampling_rate"), "interface", "$1", "output_ifindex", "(.*)"), "direction", "out", "instance_id", "(.*)")) by (instance_id, interface, direction)
metrics.description: Normalized Flow traffic rate grouped by interface and direction.

metrics.name: device_flow_interface_packets_rate
metrics.query: sum(label_replace(label_replace(sflow_packets{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__} * label_value(sflow_packets{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__}, "effective_sampling_rate"), "interface", "$1", "input_ifindex", "(.*)"), "direction", "in", "instance_id", "(.*)")) by (instance_id, interface, direction) + sum(label_replace(label_replace(sflow_packets{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__} * label_value(sflow_packets{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__}, "effective_sampling_rate"), "interface", "$1", "output_ifindex", "(.*)"), "direction", "out", "instance_id", "(.*)")) by (instance_id, interface, direction)
metrics.description: Normalized Flow packet rate grouped by interface and direction.

metrics.name: device_flow_top_interfaces_by_bytes
metrics.query: topk(10, sum(label_replace(label_replace(sflow_bytes{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__} * label_value(sflow_bytes{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__}, "effective_sampling_rate"), "interface", "$1", "input_ifindex", "(.*)"), "direction", "in", "instance_id", "(.*)")) by (instance_id, interface) + sum(label_replace(label_replace(sflow_bytes{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__} * label_value(sflow_bytes{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__}, "effective_sampling_rate"), "interface", "$1", "output_ifindex", "(.*)"), "direction", "out", "instance_id", "(.*)")) by (instance_id, interface))
metrics.display_name: Top Interfaces by Flow Traffic Rate
metrics.description: Top interfaces by normalized Flow traffic rate.

metrics.name: device_flow_protocol_bytes_rate
metrics.description: Normalized Flow traffic rate grouped by protocol.

metrics.name: device_flow_protocol_packets_rate
metrics.description: Normalized Flow packet rate grouped by protocol.

metrics.name: device_flow_dst_port_bytes_rate
metrics.description: Normalized Flow traffic rate grouped by destination port.

metrics.name: device_flow_dst_port_packets_rate
metrics.description: Normalized Flow packet rate grouped by destination port.

metrics.name: device_flow_src_port_bytes_rate
metrics.description: Normalized Flow traffic rate grouped by source port.

metrics.name: device_flow_top_src_bytes_rate
metrics.query: topk(10, sum(sflow_bytes{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__} * label_value(sflow_bytes{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__}, "effective_sampling_rate")) by (instance_id, src))
metrics.description: Top source addresses by normalized Flow traffic rate.

metrics.name: device_flow_top_dst_bytes_rate
metrics.query: topk(10, sum(sflow_bytes{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__} * label_value(sflow_bytes{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__}, "effective_sampling_rate")) by (instance_id, dst))
metrics.description: Top destination addresses by normalized Flow traffic rate.

metrics.name: device_flow_top_src_packets_rate
metrics.query: topk(10, sum(sflow_packets{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__} * label_value(sflow_packets{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__}, "effective_sampling_rate")) by (instance_id, src))
metrics.description: Top source addresses by normalized Flow packet rate.

metrics.name: device_flow_top_dst_packets_rate
metrics.query: topk(10, sum(sflow_packets{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__} * label_value(sflow_packets{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__}, "effective_sampling_rate")) by (instance_id, dst))
metrics.description: Top destination addresses by normalized Flow packet rate.

metrics.name: device_flow_top_conversation_bytes_rate
metrics.query: topk(10, sum(sflow_bytes{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__} * label_value(sflow_bytes{instance_type='switch', collect_type='sflow', __$labels__}, "effective_sampling_rate")) by (instance_id, src, dst, protocol, dst_port))
metrics.description: Top conversations by normalized Flow traffic rate.
